name: Felip
description:
'''Felip Jhon Suson''' (born January 12, 1997), known professionally as '''Felip''' and as '''Ken''' in his role as a member of [[Pinoy pop|P-pop]] group [[SB19]], is a Filipino [[Pinoy pop|singer]], songwriter, [[Pinoy hip-hop|rapper]], dancer and entrepreneur. As Ken, he is the main dancer and lead singer of the Filipino [[boy band]] [[SB19]] managed under [[1Z Entertainment]].

Felip made his solo debut with "Palayo" (2021), a slow [[R&B]] track, which was followed by the single "[[Bulan (song)|Bulan]]" (2022). He released his first [[extended play]] ''COM•PLEX'' in 2023 and his first [[album]] ''7sins'' in 2024. Honouring his roots as a [[Cebuano language|Cebuano]] speaker from Zamboanga del Sur, Felip has performed in Cebuano in addition to [[Filipino language|Filipino]] and [[English language|English]]. Although Felip is known for his distinctively deep voice, he has displayed a wide vocal range and is noted for his versatility and experimental sound.
